name: Asset Servicing Settlement Status
description: Returns pending and failed settlement records for a given relationship. Accepts relationship_id as the primary key. Accessed via MCP tool over SSE transport.

skills.name: get_settlements
skills.description: Retrieve pending and failed trade settlements for a given asset servicing relationship.
examples: any pending settlements on this account
unsettled trades I should know about
pending settlements for the Whitman Family Office relationship
what are the outstanding trade settlements on the servicing side
show me pending and failed settlements for this relationship
settlement activity and trade status across wealth and servicing
